response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack developer with strong web/backend experience (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) and some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (Dec 2014–Jun 2015, ~6 months) plus a small academic C++ project. However, the role demands a current, hands-on C++ specialist with 8–12 years of C++-centric experience, industrial automation background, IEC 62443/SDL knowledge, and protocol expertise (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT). None of these core requirements are evidenced; the candidate's recent work is web/cloud/AI tooling, not C++ or industrial systems.
strengths: 13+ years of overall software engineering experience across multiple stacks
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Strong testing/TDD culture and mentoring through workshops and Code Katas
concerns: No substantive recent C++/STL or multi-threaded systems work
No exposure to IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No experience with MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus, or industrial automation domain

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation or IEC 62443/SDL background
Broad senior engineering and architectural experience
